name: Task / Chore 🛠️
about: Track development tasks, refactoring, dependencies, or pipeline changes.
title: 'chore: [Short description of task]'
labels: chore
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Task Description
Describe the task or refactor work to be done.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🛠️ Implementation Suggestions (Optional)
Outline any specific technical steps, APIs, or components involved.

## 🔗 Dependencies
Mention any other issues or PRs that this task depends on.
